description: No spec subject — doc quality refactor. Critical-review F5 (simplicity M1): graduation rationale, runtime host/container split, and spec.evidence.migrate behavior list are each restated verbatim across 3-4 of the 6 skill files, multiplying the sync surface (the drift failure the skill preaches against). Give each topic one canonical home + pointers (~-30 lines). Sketch in vault .../20260722-203631-simplicity.md M1.

comments.text:
Dedup complete (impl-only; left in_progress for cold verify). Commit e6024dd.

Per topic — canonical home + pointers + net line delta:

1. Graduation rationale — canonical: task-templates.md "Graduation review"
   section (owns the actual bw create/bw defer ticket body). Pointers now in:
   SKILL.md 4.5 (kept the operational bash stub + one-line pointer) and
   adoption-phases.md done-criterion #5. Net -6 lines (SKILL -3, adoption -3).

2. Runtime host/container split — canonical: detection-matrix.md "Runtime split
   — host vs container" (full host-side/container-side rationale). Pointer now
   in SKILL.md 1.6 (kept the detection bash + "record runtime: containerized" +
   Phase-2 instruction; dropped the restated host/container rationale it had
   redundantly alongside its own "See the detection matrix" pointer). Net -1.

3. spec.evidence.migrate behavior list — canonical: task-templates.md
   "Pre-ledger migration" Deliverable. Pointer now in detection-matrix.md
   "Pre-ledger legacy workspace" (replaced the 4-line behavior blockquote with
   a one-clause pointer; kept the classification instruction + local rationale
   sentence). SKILL.md 1.2/4.4 were already pointer-only — untouched. Net -2.

Overall net: -9 lines (SKILL -4, adoption -3, detection -2). Under the ~-30
estimate — see "deliberately left" below; the sync-surface elimination (one
canonical copy per topic) is fully achieved even though raw line drop is
smaller, because each restatement was a 4-6 line block and a pointer has a
2-3 line floor. I did not force deletions of legitimate operational scaffolding
to hit -30.

Deliberately left duplicated (with reason):
- SKILL.md Phase 2 "Containerized runtime" ask-step keeps the two command
  definitions inline (<host_check_cmd>/<container_verify_cmd> examples). This is
  the point where the skill actually asks the user; inlining the concrete
  examples keeps the ask self-contained rather than forcing a mid-operation jump
  to detection-matrix. It is a brief operational restatement, not the full
  rationale (which is centralized).
- task-templates.md substitution-token glossary (<host_check_cmd> etc.) and the
  brief "split loop" mentions in phase0 deliverable / adoption-phases phase0
  done-criteria are local operational context, not the rationale — left as-is;
  they already point at detection-matrix.md.

Verification: mix compile --warnings-as-errors clean (no-op). mix spec.check
--no-run-commands => status=pass errors=0. The only findings are 3x
branch_guard_missing_subject_update on specled.package (its surface globs cover
these skill docs) — downgraded to info via a Spec-Drift trailer in the commit,
since this is a docs-only dedup with zero requirement/behavior change to the
subject (two-armed rubric: ticket-local deviation). Verifier should scrutinize
that trailer choice: prior docs-only skill commit (966b28e) used the same
escape-hatch pattern; commit #6 instead updated package.spec.md because it added
real content — mine adds none, so the trailer is the honest path.

VERIFY: PASS

Session: cold-verify-m8y (verifier agent, worktree specled_ex-bootstrap-dedup)
Log: git diff main..e6024dd; read all 6 bootstrap files; grep of the three topics' key phrases across the skill dir; make smoke; mix compile --warnings-as-errors; mix spec.check --no-run-commands; grep branch_check.ex severity defaults; confirmed mix task files exist.

Mechanical checks:
- Scope clean. git diff --name-only main..e6024dd = exactly 3 files, all under skills/spec-led-bootstrap/ (SKILL.md, references/adoption-phases.md, references/detection-matrix.md). No lib/test/config/.spec touched. PASS.
- mix compile --warnings-as-errors: clean no-op. PASS.
- mix spec.check --no-run-commands: status=pass errors=0 warnings=0. 3 findings on specled.package = branch_guard_missing_subject_update, downgraded :error -> :info by the commit's Spec-Drift trailer. Confirmed the trailer is load-bearing: branch_check.ex:17 defaults this code to :error, so without the trailer these 3 would fail; trailer.ex honors the downgrade (empirically pass). PASS.
- Post-merge green reasoning: file-touch findings are diff-range-scoped (changed_files=3 vs origin/main). Once merged, main contains these skill-doc edits; a fresh branch off main diffs against them absent from its range, so branch_guard_missing_subject_update does not re-fire on these files -> spec.check stays green on main with no trailer needed. Confirmed empty-range does not re-fire.

Requirements coverage: n/a — no spec subject (doc-quality ticket).

Corpus-scoped claims: 6 validated, 5 by execution.
1. Graduation rationale — ONE canonical home confirmed at task-templates.md "Graduation review" (lines 409-437: failure-mode rationale + full bw create/bw defer body + standalone-clock rationale). SKILL.md 4.5 and adoption-phases.md #5 are now pure pointers (kept the operational bash stub in 4.5). grep "recedes forever"/"scheduled artifact"/"observed failure mode" = only task-templates.md + the SKILL pointer line. Duplication gone, not moved. [execution]
2. Runtime host/container split — ONE canonical home confirmed at detection-matrix.md "Runtime split — host vs container" (lines 57-79; the "Host side"/"Container side" rationale block appears ONLY there). SKILL.md 1.6 (line 196) is a pointer. grep "Host side"/"Container side" = single occurrence. [execution]
3. spec.evidence.migrate behavior list — ONE canonical home confirmed at task-templates.md "Pre-ledger migration" (lines 72-110). detection-matrix.md replaced its 4-line blockquote with a one-clause pointer; grep "hoists any legacy"/"seeds the orphan" = only task-templates.md. Canonical version is a SUPERSET of the removed blockquote (adds "when the current tree is not already attested") — no meaning lost. [execution]
4. All pointers resolve to real sections that contain the referenced content: "Graduation review" (task-templates.md:409), "Runtime split — host vs container" (detection-matrix.md:57), "Pre-ledger migration" (task-templates.md:72). No dangling pointers. Each edited file read end-to-end still stands alone. [execution]
5. No operational instruction changed meaning — only rationale prose removed. host_check_cmd/container_verify_cmd/verify_cmd tokens, mix spec.evidence.migrate, mix spec.check --no-run-commands all intact; the two named mix tasks exist (lib/mix/tasks/spec.evidence.migrate.ex, spec.evidence.install_hook.ex). [execution]
6. Deliberately-retained duplication is genuinely local operational context, not the centralized rationale: SKILL.md §2 "Containerized runtime" ask-step (lines 254-260) keeps the concrete <host_check_cmd>/<container_verify_cmd> examples at the point the skill asks the user, without restating the host-vs-container WHY; task-templates.md substitution-token glossary (lines 8-21) is token definitions. Both correct. [read]

Gaps: none blocking.

Verdict: PASS. Three restated topics each collapsed to one canonical home with resolving pointers; no meaning lost (one topic's canonical copy is a superset); no operational identifier changed; scope clean; spec.check green on branch and reasoned green post-merge.

Notes:
- Pre-existing, out of scope: adoption-phases.md line 252 says "Once those four hold" under a list of FIVE numbered done-criteria (item 5 predates this commit; the diff only reworded item 5's rationale, not the count). Latent doc nit unrelated to this dedup.
- Net -9 lines vs the ~-30 sketch estimate. Sync-surface elimination (one canonical copy per topic) is fully achieved; the smaller raw delta is because each restatement was a 4-6 line block and a pointer has a 2-3 line floor. Not a defect.
- Trailer choice is honest: docs-only dedup adds zero content to specled.package, so the ticket-local Spec-Drift info downgrade (two-armed rubric) is the correct path vs updating the subject spec (which prior content-adding commit #6 did); matches the escape-hatch precedent in docs-only commit 966b28e.

STAGED (not merged). Cherry-picked into branch filler/m8y-wr3 = PR-2 (with wr3) as commit fde8e9c (from e6024dd). Cold verify PASS (empty-range non-refire of the Spec-Drift trailer confirmed). PR-2 full merge gate GREEN: compile-warnings-as-errors, mix test 1032/0, format, deps.unlock, mix spec.check (commands run) status=pass errors=0. Left in_progress pending PR merge.

title: spec-led-bootstrap docs: single-source-of-truth dedup of restated rationale
